overall.description: A nighttime walk along an urban waterfront promenade, with the camera holder moving past an elevated pier structure and approaching a small building. The city skyline with illuminated towers is visible in the background, and a Hard Rock Cafe sign appears briefly as the camera explores the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with city skyline view

entered.detail: elevated highway or pier structure with illuminated windows and signage underneath
cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings including a distinctive tower with '02' signage
dark water reflecting city lights along the waterfront edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide waterfront promenade at night. The camera moves forward along a concrete walkway, with an elevated pier structure spanning the center of the frame and the illuminated city skyline visible to the left. The water is dark and calm on the right, reflecting the ambient city lights.

events.description: camera begins turning right toward the illuminated small building on the pier

agents.ego_description: turning right and approaching a small building structure on the waterfront pier

entered.detail: small single-story building with illuminated windows on the pier structure
tall street lamp illuminating the pier area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right toward a small illuminated building on the pier. The elevated highway structure shifts to the left side of the frame as the water exits the view. A street lamp becomes visible on the right, and the city skyline remains visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier building area with landmark signage

events.description: camera turns left back toward the waterfront and city skyline

agents.ego_description: turning left around the building, passing stacked chairs and the Hard Rock Cafe sign, returning to the waterfront view

entered.detail: illuminated circular Hard Rock Cafe sign on a distant building
stacked lounge chairs or beach furniture on the ground near the building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves around the small building, revealing stacked beach chairs on the right and a distant illuminated Hard Rock Cafe sign. The camera then turns left, passing the sign and returning to the waterfront view with the elevated pier structure and city skyline coming back into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime waterfront promenade that shifts from a wide urban vista to a close exploration of a pier building before returning to the city skyline. It begins by moving forward along a concrete walkway, with an elevated pier structure spanning the frame and the illuminated city skyline reflecting in the dark, calm water to the right. As the camera turns right, the water exits the view and the highway structure shifts to the left, drawing the focus toward a small illuminated building and a nearby street lamp. The scene then expands as the camera moves around the building to reveal stacked beach chairs and a distant Hard Rock Cafe sign, before turning left to pass the sign. Finally, the perspective returns to the open waterfront, bringing the elevated pier structure and the glowing towers of the city back into full view.
